explanation: This is the original true positive command and is not mutated.
Inserted an extra space between msiexec.exe and /y to test if the Sigma rule detects the command despite whitespace variation.
Replaced /y with -y to test if the Sigma rule detects the command despite substitution of equivalent syntax.
Removed space between msiexec.exe and /y to test if the Sigma rule detects the command despite omission of optional whitespace.
Added an empty quoted string at the end to test if the Sigma rule detects the command despite insertion of benign extra arguments.
Removed quotes around the DLL path to test if the Sigma rule detects the command despite omission of optional quotes.
